name: inline-children-double-quoted-attr
note: Baseline: inline children, double quotes (single-line → parsed as inline mdxJsxTextElement = jsxInline thin shape)

name: single-quote-to-double-quote-normalization
note: HIGHLIGHTED: mdast-util-mdx-jsx serializer normalizes single-quoted attrs to double-quoted. Library-specific behavior — a version bump could silently flip this.

name: expression-attr-identifier
note: Expression attrs preserve source text verbatim via MdxJsxAttributeValueExpression.value

name: boolean-shorthand-attr
note: Boolean attrs (value: null in mdast) serialize as shorthand

name: flush-left-block-children-emphasis
note: HIGHLIGHTED: our custom mdxJsxFlowElementHandler emits children flush-left (zero indent). Tests the FR-6 handler's contract with emphasis inside container.

name: flush-left-nested-jsx-container
note: HIGHLIGHTED (US-012 rewrite): nested JSX in a 5-pack composition (Callout > Accordion). Flush-left handler emits consistent blank-line separation between children. Was `<Steps>/<Step>` pre-US-012 rewrite; semantics identical.

name: dotted-name-with-children
note: HIGHLIGHTED: dotted component names (member access) preserve through parse/serialize round-trip

name: complex-array-expression-attr
note: Complex expressions (array literals) round-trip via estree AST preservation

name: self-closing-trailing-newline
note: Self-closing block JSX with trailing newline — remark-stringify final-newline handling
